caption: An elderly man with gray hair and glasses speaks at a podium against a background of horizontal wooden slats. He wears a light blue button-down shirt featuring an embroidered eagle on the chest, a beaded necklace with a circular pendant, and a colorful sash across his waist. He stands behind a wooden lectern that has a white sign with a stylized red sun logo and the word "ORCA" printed in bold black letters to the right. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. As he speaks, he looks down toward papers on the podium and shifts his gaze slightly. The back of another person's head is visible in the lower left and center of the scene. The scene remains consistent across the frames, with only minor changes in the man's facial expression and head position as he delivers his speech.
